name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted in pink leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, showcasing a modern temperament. Pink leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front horsebit detail, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

Dimensions: 13(L) x 24(W) x 5.5cm(D).
Color: Pink/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
